arts.ttl: Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou reveals why even Mohamed Salah would struggle at Spurs
arts.sum: Postecoglou defends Heung-min Son, insisting Spurs’ selection problems are so bad that high-flying Liverpool talisman couldn’t flourish

DM: Rodrigo Bentancur - Absent at the weekend after a fresh suspension, Bentancur's return could be significant against Liverpool. Defensive absentees have been notable in recent months, with Spurs' 6-3 defeat to the Reds before Christmas highlighting the lack of organisation and solidity within the rearguard.

Liverpool can take a step closer to defending their Carabao Cup crown and winning a first piece of silverware under Arne Slot when they visit Tottenham Hotspur on Wednesday. He's provided three assists in his last three for the Reds, splitting Man Utd's defence with an excellent pass as Liverpool equalised at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Cup win in adversity could be springboard for Tottenham – Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Spurs face Liverpool in the Carabao Cup semi-final, with the first leg in north London on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou backs misfiring Son and says even Salah would struggle at Spurs
arts.sum: Manager highlights context of Son’s poor form Tottenham have interest in PSG forward Kolo Muani Ange Postecoglou has backed Son Heung-min to rediscover his best form and suggested even Mohamed Salah would struggle in the current Tottenham team. Son, who has seen Spurs trigger their one-year option on his contract to tie him down until the summer of 2026, goes into Wednesday night’s Carabao Cup semi-final first leg at home to Liverpool with an unforgiving spotlight on his performances. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Randal Kolo Muani, Antonin Kinsky, transfers and Son contract
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou held his pre-match press conference at Hotspur Way on Tuesday ahead of Tottenham's Carabao Cup semi-final first leg clash against Liverpool. There was plenty to discuss for the Spurs boss following the signing of goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky from Slavia Prague with the 21-year-old arriving on Sunday in a deal that could be worth around £12.5million with add-ons.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Mohamed Salah comparison to sum up Tottenham's brutal reality
arts.sum: Tottenham remain without up to 10 players for Carabao Cup tie against Liverpool with Ange Postecoglou admitting even Premier League's top scorer would find it tough to shine in his team

arts.ttl: Neco Williams fires message to ex-club Liverpool after Nottingham Forest close gap at the top
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have won six straight Premier League matches and are within six points of Liverpool - their next opponents - and Neco Williams is feeling confident

arts.ttl: Even Salah would struggle at Spurs - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou says even in-form Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah would find life a struggle at the moment in the Tottenham team he manages.

arts.ttl: 'We met with him: Manager confirms he personally spoke to £32m Tottenham player last summer but deal failed
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are in desperate need of reinforcements in this transfer window, but there are a couple of players who could leave too. Spurs are...
